title: /.well-known/veyra.json Specification v1
description: The standard discovery file for AI agent commit mode. Any domain hosting /.well-known/veyra.json signals to AI agents that production writes require Veyra commit mode authorization. Analogous to robots.txt for crawlers or security.txt for vulnerability disclosure — but for AI write authorization.

provider.description: URL of the commit mode provider (Veyra).

description.description: Human-readable description of the commit mode policy for this domain.

required.description: Whether production writes to this domain require commit mode.

provider.description: Name of the commit mode provider.

authorize_endpoint.description: Endpoint to authorize a write action and receive a commit token.

verify_endpoint.description: Endpoint for this tool to verify incoming commit tokens. Free forever.

trust_discovery.description: Endpoint template for checking trust status. {domain} is replaced with the target domain.

settlement_endpoint.description: Endpoint to submit execution receipts for settlement.

error.description: The machine-readable error code returned when a write is rejected.

retry_strategy.description: The retry strategy for the agent to follow.

spec.description: Link to this JSON Schema specification.
